title: Huawei AR303W wireless Dual Band Wi-Fi router, 300+866Mbps, ETH/SFP WAN
description: Huawei AR303W is a powerful and compact enterprise router designed for small and medium-sized businesses, offering high-speed connectivity and advanced network functions. It features an ETH/SFP WAN port for connection flexibility, multi-WAN configuration options to increase reliability, integrated Wi-Fi , support for VPN protocols , and advanced security features to protect data. With easy management and centralized configuration capabilities, it is an ideal choice for businesses that require a… Device 12V / 2A DC power adapter
